original: Right click this item then left click a Magic item to apply it.

translation.zh_cn: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件魔法物品以使用。
translation.zh_tw: 右鍵點擊此物品，再左鍵點擊一件魔法物品施用。

original: Right click this item then left click a Rare item to apply it.

translation.zh_cn: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击一件稀有物品以使用。
translation.zh_tw: 右鍵點擊此物品，再左鍵點擊一件稀有物品來施用。

original: Upgrades a [Magic|Magic] item to a [Rare|Rare] item, adding a guaranteed modifier

translation.zh_cn: 将一件[Magic|魔法]物品升级为[Rare|稀有]物品，必定增加一项词缀
translation.zh_tw: 將一件[Magic|魔法]物品升級成[Rare|稀有]物品，且必定新增 1 條詞綴

original: Removes a random modifier and augments a [Rare|Rare] item with a new guaranteed modifier

translation.zh_cn: 移除一个随机词缀，并强化一件[Rare|稀有]物品，使其必定获得一个新词缀
translation.zh_tw: 移除一個隨機詞綴，且必定為一件[Rare|稀有]物品新增一項詞綴

translation.zh_tw: 手套: 所承受[Lightning|閃電]傷害的 {0}% [Recouped|補償]為生命

original: Belt: {0}% of [Fire|Fire] Damage taken [Recouped|Recouped] as Life

translation.zh_cn: 腰带: 将承受的[Fire|火焰]伤害的 {0}% [Recouped|吸纳]为生命
translation.zh_tw: 腰带: 承受的[Fire|火焰]傷害 {0}% [Recouped|補償]為生命

original: Helmet: {0}% of [Cold|Cold] Damage taken [Recouped|Recouped] as Life

translation.zh_cn: 头盔: 将承受的[Cold|冰霜]伤害的 {0}% [Recouped|吸纳]为生命
translation.zh_tw: 頭盔: 承受的[Cold|冰冷]傷害 {0}% [Recouped|補償]為生命

original: Body Armour: {0}% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage

translation.zh_cn: 胸甲: 受到击中物理伤害的 {0}% 转化为混沌伤害
translation.zh_tw: 身體護甲: 承受 {0}% 的擊中物理傷害視為混沌傷害

original: [Martial Weapon|Martial Weapon]: {0}% chance to gain [Onslaught|Onslaught] on Killing [Hits|Hits] with this Weapon

translation.zh_cn: [Martial Weapon|战斗武器]: 此武器进行造成最后[Hits|一击]时有 {0}% 的几率获得[Onslaught|猛攻]
translation.zh_tw: [Martial Weapon|軍用武器]: 以此武器[Hits|擊中]且為最後一擊時，有 {0}% 機率獲得[Onslaught|猛攻]

original: Gloves: {0}% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies

translation.zh_cn: 手套: 被击败的敌人掉落的金币数量提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 手套: 增加 {0}% 殺死敵人時掉落的金幣數量

original: Body Armour: Hits against you have {0}% reduced [Critical Damage Bonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

translation.zh_cn: 胸甲: 对你的击中的[Critical Damage Bonus|暴击伤害加成]降低 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 身體護甲: 對你的擊中減少 {0}% [Critical Damage Bonus|暴擊傷害加成]

original: Body Armour: {0}% increased maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 胸甲: 生命上限提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 身體護甲: 增加 {0}% 最大生命

original: Ring: {0}% increased maximum Mana

translation.zh_cn: 戒指: 魔力上限提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 戒指: 增加 {0}% 最大魔力

original: [Equipment|Equipment]: [Mark of the Abyssal Lord|Mark of the Abyssal Lord]

translation.zh_cn: [Equipment|装备]: [Mark of the Abyssal Lord|深渊领主的印记]
translation.zh_tw: [Equipment|裝備]: [Mark of the Abyssal Lord|深淵領主印記]
